mrpipeline: Functions to set up a pipeline for performing Mendelian randomization

mrpipeline-package.Rd

Pipeline to perform forward mendelian randomization analyses, including multiple comparison assessments and colocalization analyses. This package provides manuscript ready tables and figures.

Author

Maintainer: Benjamin Zuckerman benjamin.zuckerman@kcl.ac.uk (ORCID)

Authors:

  • Alasdair Warwick (ORCID)

Developed by Benjamin Zuckerman, Alasdair Warwick.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
